response: Upstairs the publisher loves brain teasers. The editor compiles a book with 3 sections. Each section has a different number of puzzles. * * * The first section has 12 puzzles. The second section has twice as many puzzles. The third section has 5 more puzzles. * * * The total number of puzzles is the sum. The sum equals 12 plus 24 plus 29. Any other questions?
